battleTraits.name: Predict the Future
battleTraits.description: Look at the top 3 cards of the Battle Tactic deck. Rearrange them in any order.

regimentAbilities.name: Mutative Aura
regimentAbilities.description: Pick an enemy unit within 18". Until end of turn, that unit suffers 1 mortal damage for each unmodified Hit roll of 1.

regimentAbilities.name: Eldritch Raiders
regimentAbilities.description: Friendly units in enemy territory add +1 to Wound rolls.
